scope: Malaysia tech/community ecosystem with emphasis on public event organizers, speakers, volunteers, microsponsors, and attendees
notes: Publicly accessible links only; entries with no personal profile use an event/community source page.

entries.name: Heislyc Loh
entries.description: Community builder, startup coach, and product manager in Kuala Lumpur. Focuses on technology, entrepreneurship, education, and innovation.

entries.name: Rudy Baer
entries.description: Founder, CEO, and CTO at BearStudio; co-founder of Fork it! Community and a long-time organizer bringing developers together through conferences and knowledge sharing.

entries.name: Aziz Ouertani
entries.description: Backend developer and sales lead at BearStudio who helps grow Fork it! Community and organizes events connecting developers and tech enthusiasts.

entries.name: Jeff Sandhu
entries.description: CEO at Sunway FutureX DI 42 Malaysia and an organizer / venue coordinator for Fork it! Community events in Kuala Lumpur.

entries.name: Joong Sern (Johnson) Yap
entries.description: Strategic Growth & Development Manager who helps organize Fork it! Community events and coordinates venues in Kuala Lumpur.

entries.name: Eason Chai
entries.description: Founder of ELVTD, a Web3 software studio. Active community contributor, hackathon participant, and open-source builder.

entries.name: Raihan Nismara
entries.description: Frontend engineer and speaker who contributes through podcasts, volunteering, and public speaking in the tech community.

entries.name: Noratikah Zahidi
entries.description: Kuala Lumpur-based organizer active in Fork it! Community events and local tech meetups.

entries.name: Keith Rozario
entries.description: Malaysian cybersecurity writer and open-source voice whose blog and rawSEC work make him a key reference in the security community.

entries.name: Dr. Lau Cher Han
entries.description: AI expert, educator, and technology leader helping organizations across Malaysia and beyond adopt artificial intelligence and machine learning.

entries.name: Ruhani Rabin
entries.description: Technologist, Product Leader, WordPress Veteran, Community Builder, and WordCamp Organizer with 25+ years in Software and SaaS.

entries.name: Suzaidee
entries.description: I started using WordPress to create my portfolio as a freelance photographer. Since then, I never looked back. Now, WordPress is an essential part of my work as a web designer and trainer.

entries.name: Michael Kwan
entries.description: Michael is the founder of WebX.my , an AI-powered website creation platform built on WordPress. Since its launch in December 2023, WebX has been dedicated to democratizing website ownership and was selected for the MyStartup Pre-Accelerator Cohort 3 by Cradle & MOSTI.

entries.name: Mainul Kabir Aion
entries.description: Mainul is a Data Storyteller and Marketing Strategist with WordPress experience since 2016. He is an Event Supporter (Mentor) for the Global WordPress Community team. He has organized, volunteered, and spoken at numerous WordCamps globally. Mainul has worked for companies like weDevs, XpeedStudio, Staff Asia, One Education, and Wpmet as CMO/Head of Marketing. Currently, he leads his agency, offering strategic marketing guidance to product companies.

entries.name: Eric Low
entries.description: Beyond his work as a linguist, he is passionate about exploring new technology, health & well-being. These pursuits brings him immense joy & fulfillment.

entries.name: Al-Hadee Mohd Roslan
entries.description: For over a decade, I haven’t just built websites; I fix, secure, and transform them into fast, reliable, and easy-to-manage digital assets. From growing SMEs to government departments, I’ve helped them master WordPress, not be mastered by it.

links.label: The Future of WordPress in a World of AI Website Builders

entries.name: Peng Hao
entries.description: Peng Hao is a professional graphic designer with a passion for visual storytelling. His creative journey has led him to explore the world of UX/UI design, where he applies his keen eye for aesthetics and user-centered thinking to craft engaging digital experiences. Beyond the screen, Peng Hao is a photography enthusiast, always ready to capture the beauty of the world through his lens. His diverse skill set and artistic pursuits make him a true creative force.

entries.name: Rodziah Daruri
entries.description: With nearly 6 years of experience in the web hosting industry, I’m passionate about helping businesses grow online. I enjoy connecting with people and making technology easier to understand. Whether you’re a WordPress user or not, I’m always happy to share solutions and guidance. I’m also deeply passionate about community building and knowledge sharing, and I’m excited to contribute my organizational skills to WordCamp Malaysia in support of the WordPress community’s growth. Feel free to reach out anytime!

entries.name: Ben Leow
entries.description: Ben Leow is a web developer and founder of Surf7.net , with deep experience in WordPress, automation, and digital solutions for businesses in Malaysia. He has built custom plugins, streamlined workflows with AI and n8n, and developed practical tools ranging from web design packages to custom WhatsApp AI chatbot. Passionate about empowering communities, Ben also contributes to WordPress meetups and shares knowledge on scaling businesses with web and AI technologies. As part of the WordCamp Malaysia 2025 organizing team, he focuses on creating meaningful experiences that bring developers, designers, and entrepreneurs together.

entries.name: Aril Azam
entries.description: Aril Azam is a creative web designer and the co-founder of Rekamy, a creative digital agency specializing in web design and development. With expertise in WordPress, Laravel, and Vue.js, He provides tailored digital solutions from Startups to GLC companies. Aril is not only dedicated to his work but also leads an active lifestyle as a gym junkie and marathoner.

entries.name: Shahidah Azira
entries.description: Events and people have always been my happy place. I love connecting, learning, and contributing however I can. It’s where I feel the most inspired and alive. Being surrounded by passionate individuals, sharing ideas, and growing together is something I truly enjoy. That’s why I’m excited to join WordCamp Malaysia 2025 and be part of a community that brings so much inspiration, creativity, and positive energy. I can’t wait to experience it all and give my best along the way!

entries.name: Sofi Pedilin
entries.description: Qhoirussofea Pedilin , or Sofi for short, is a cybersecurity enthusiast with a deep curiosity that bridges technology and creativity. She enjoys exploring diverse fields — from art, language, and design to hands-on hardware projects and software development.

entries.name: Afzan Abu Bakar
entries.description: Nor Afzan Binti Abu Bakar or simply Afzan — is a passionate marketer who believes that great marketing starts with strong branding. For her, branding isn’t just about visuals or logos — it’s about creating a lasting impression that people remember, even years later. She often says, “Branding is long-term. Once people know your brand, they’ll always recognize it.”

entries.name: Nathan Onn
entries.description: Nathan Onn is a web development virtuoso with a unique talent for turning digital challenges into business opportunities.

entries.name: Shahjahan Jewel
entries.description: Working with WordPress since 2010, building plugins and running a WordPress plugin business. My plugins power over 1,000,000 websites and I’ve got a strong team of 120+ members.

entries.name: Yves Tan
entries.description: SEO Specialist Yves Tan helps businesses scale online growth. He implements strategic SEO and Google Ads, coupled with a CRO (Conversion Rate Optimization) approach to build high-performing websites. He is also a voracious reader and chess enthusiast.

entries.name: Ahmed Kabir Chaion
entries.description: Ahmed Kabir Chaion is the WordPress Contributions Lead at Hosting.com & Rocket.net and serves as a Polyglots Team Rep. A Core Contributor since WordPress 5.6, he has been recognized as a Noteworthy Contributor across multiple releases.

entries.name: Adrita Chakraborty
entries.description: Adrita Chakraborty is a WordPress writer turned entrepreneur who’s on a mission to help women build digital empires with authenticity and purpose.

entries.name: Nurul Syahmina
entries.description: Nurul Syahmina bukanlah nama baharu dalam komuniti WordPress. Beliau pernah menjadi speaker di WordCamp Malaysia 2023, dan tahun ini beliau kembali dengan semangat untuk membantu pengguna memahami bahawa error bukanlah sesuatu yang menakutkan; ia hanyalah petunjuk untuk kita memperbaiki sistem dengan lebih baik.

entries.name: Zee Khamaruldin
entries.description: A long-time WordPress user since the early 2010s, Zee has spoken at WordCamp Malaysia 2024 and WordCamp Johor Bahru 2025. Through her brand Tech Fairy, she helps bloggers and small business owners fix, fine-tune, and flourish online.

entries.name: David Wang
entries.description: If you’ve ever wished your WordPress site could just work faster, smoother, and smarter — then David Wang is the man you’ve been looking for.

links.label: The Future of WordPress in a World of AI Website Builders

entries.name: Noor Khan
entries.description: Starting a business in the WordPress ecosystem can feel overwhelming, especially if you’re not a developer. Noor Khan has walked that path — and lived to tell the tale.

links.label: From Zero to Launch: What Not to Do

entries.name: Stephen Paul Samynathan
entries.description: Marketing analytics doesn’t have to feel like rocket science. Stephen Paul Samynathan is here to show you a simpler, smarter, and faster way to make data work for you.

links.label: Level Up for Marketing Analytics Using MCP

entries.name: Habibur Rahman
entries.description: Meet Habibur Rahman , the Founder and CEO of Wealcoder , the company behind Animation Addons for Elementor — the first-ever GSAP-powered animation builder made just for WordPress. With over 11 years of experience in the WordPress ecosystem, Habibur has helped thousands of businesses bring creativity and movement to their websites.

links.label: Supercharging WordPress with GSAP Animations — No Code Needed

entries.name: Shehab Ahmed
entries.description: WordPress websites are powerful, but they’re also targets. Shehab Ahmed knows the stakes.

entries.name: James Hunt
entries.description: Search is changing — fast. Between Google’s AI Overviews, TikTok search, ChatGPT answers, and social discovery, the old “just rank on Google” mindset doesn’t cut it anymore.

links.label: The State of Search: SEO in the Age of AI

entries.name: Hariz Halim
entries.description: A beautiful website is great — but a website that converts ? That’s where the magic happens.

links.label: How to Build a Convert Website. Functional too

entries.name: Kenny Lee
entries.description: Ever wondered how global tech brands like AWS, HubSpot, and Setapp consistently appear at the top of Google search results? Kenny Lee knows their secrets — and he’s ready to share them with you.

links.label: Write to Rank – How to Strategize Blog Creation for SEO, AI and Human

entries.name: Aiman Sani
entries.description: Dalam dunia pemasaran digital, memiliki website yang cantik sahaja tak cukup. Salespage perlu dibina secara tersusun, dan mudah difahami oleh viewer yang datang mengunjungi halaman tersebut.
